channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Block reaches $45M settlement with 46 states over Cash App fraud probe
item.description: State attorneys general said they found that Block misled users by falsely advertising that Cash App provided bank-like protections, including advanced fraud detection.

item.title: J’ai vu la MG GO! et je pense que cette future citadine électrique pourrait faire mal aux R5 et Polo électriques
item.description: J'ai pu découvrir la MG GO!, un concept-car préfigurant la future citadine électrique abordable de la marque prévue pour 2027. Une première impression plutôt positive, et qui laisse deviner une redoutable concurrente des Renault 5 et Volkswagen ID. Polo.

item.title: Chrome pour Android reçoit le bouton Retour jusque là exclusif à iOS
item.description: Sur Android, le navigateur Chrome rattrape un petit retard qu'il avait sur sa version iOS. Le changement peut facilement passer inaperçu, mais il se révèle pratique à l'usage.

item.title: Accenture confirms breach after hacker steals 35GB of source code and other data
item.description: A threat actor called 888 claims to have stolen 35GB of secrets and other files from Accenture.

item.title: Asus unveils the 'elite' ROG Raikiri II Pro PC Controller featuring 'competition-grade responsiveness and ultra-low latency' and the Gjallar Gaming Soundbar that boasts 'intuitive cross-platform controls'
item.description: Asus Republic of Gamers has announced the ROG Raikiri II Pro, a high-end, elite performance PC controller, and the premium, compact Gjallar Gaming Soundbar.

item.title: The enterprise AI challenge nobody solves with code generation alone
item.description: Presented by SAPGenerating code with AI is fast, but getting that code to run reliably inside a large enterprise, integrated with live systems, governed for compliance, and maintainable over years requires foundational work that most organizations underestimate. While 81% of all organizations have a detailed strategy, only 12–16% reach AI‑driven execution, says SAP's Michael Ameling, CPO of SAP Business Technology Platform, and the reasons rarely come down to the quality of the generated code."Across industries, enterprises that have invested heavily in AI tooling are hitting a wall when gener...

item.title: Une brosse à dents électrique pour à peine 20 €, c’est possible avec l’Oral-B Vitality Pro en solde
item.description: L'Oral-B Vitality Pro est une brosse à dents électrique d'entrée de gamme avec technologie oscillo-rotative et trois modes de brossage que l'on retrouve en promotion pour une vingtaine d'euros seulement pendant les soldes.

item.title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
item.description: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

item.title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
item.description: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC backed exits since 2000.

item.title: Voici les 14 meilleures offres si vous voulez changer votre smartphone pendant les soldes d’été
item.description: Les prix des smartphones dégringolent encore d'un cran pour cette 3e démarque des soldes. C'est le moment idéal pour changer de téléphone au meilleur prix, que ce soit du haut de gamme ou un modèle plus abordable.

item.title: You can snap up a Lego Hubble set before the real one burns up in the atmosphere
item.description: The $140, 1,252-piece Hubble Telescope Lego set goes on sale on August 1.

item.title: Chat Control revient : les eurodéputés français ont massivement soutenu la manœuvre
item.description: Une majorité d'eurodéputés a voté jeudi contre le retour du scan des messageries. Le texte est passé quand même. Et dans la mécanique qui a rendu ce tour de passe-passe possible, les élus français ont laissé des traces très consultables.

item.title: L’iPhone 18 Pro Max serait plus épais et plus lourd que son prédécesseur, mais pour une bonne raison
item.description: Un leaker fiable dévoile ce qui serait le poids et l'épaisseur du futur iPhone 18 Pro Max d'Apple. Surprise : il fait moins bien que l'iPhone 17 Pro Max sur les deux aspects. C'est pourtant une bonne chose.

item.title: World Cup 2026 live stream: TV Channels and Fixtures worldwide
item.description: Here's how you can watch World Cup 2026 live streams from anywhere in the world as the quarter finals kick off on 9 July .

item.title: Sony RX10 V : le mythique bridge expert avec zoom x25 est de retour après 9 ans d’absence
item.description: Sony ressort son bridge expert RX10 après presque neuf ans de silence. Le RX10 V garde le même objectif 24-600 mm mais change tout à l'intérieur, à 2 500 euros.

item.title: Mercedes prive la CLA électrique de 880 km d’autonomie : pourquoi la batterie XXL est réservée à la version AMG
item.description: Mercedes aurait pu vendre une CLA avec près de 900 km d'autonomie. Mais la marque a choisi de réserver sa nouvelle batterie XXL de 94 kWh exclusivement à la déclinaison surpuissante AMG. Afin de ne pas trop faire d'ombre à la nouvelle Classe C électrique ?

item.title: Sonos Ace wireless headphones are steeply discounted
item.description: If you’re looking for a discount on a great pair of active noise-canceling headphones for your summer adventures (even if they’re indoors), you’re in luck. The Sonos Ace headphones in black are currently on sale for $279 (usually $399) at a variety of retailers, including Amazon, Best Buy, Walmart, and directly from Sonos. Weirdly, the […]

item.title: Smarter, not faster: AI infra’s sobering effect on fiber strategy
item.description: While the AI data center boom is undoubtedly an opportunity for the fiber industry, it also presents something of a challenge.

item.title: La pub va bientôt envahir ChatGPT en France
item.description: ChatGPT prépare son arrivée publicitaire en France, et payer un abonnement ne protégera pas tout le monde. La méthode est déjà rodée : déploiement par paliers, et des utilisateurs qui ferment de moins en moins les pubs.

item.title: MobLand season 2 gets September release date as Paramount+ drops 'ruthless' first teaser trailer after controversial Tom Hardy exit drama
item.description: With the Tom Hardy exit drama now seemingly buried, Paramount+ has revealed the release date and first teaser trailer for MobLand season 2.

item.title: Plus de réparation ni d’échange : le SAV de OnePlus ne donne que des bons d’achat inutilisables
item.description: En Europe, OnePlus ne répare ni ne remplace plus certains produits défectueux sous garantie. La marque envoie des bons d’achat à dépenser sur une boutique en ligne quasiment vide.

item.title: I read Careless People, the Meta tell-all — and it made me want the chapter Sarah Wynn-Williams couldn’t write
item.description: Reading Careless People helped me understand how Facebook’s internal culture may have allowed Mark Zuckerberg’s strange metaverse obsession to become Meta’s defining idea.

item.title: The PocketMage resurrects the PDA with an e-paper screen
item.description: Personal digital assistants like the iconic Palm Pilot were one of many devices we thought went extinct with the arrival of the smartphone. But similar to Canon resurrecting a nearly decade-old digital camera to appeal to point-and-shoot fans, Talisman Design is crowdfunding a clamshell PDA called the PocketMage that combines a tactile keyboard with both […]...

item.title: MG dévoile le Cyber, un futur grand SUV électrique aux airs de Ford Mustang Mach-e
item.description: Le constructeur britannique profite du Festival de vitesse de Goodwood pour lever le voile sur son futur Cyber. Ce concept-car annonce l’arrivée d’une nouvelle voiture électrique prenant la forme d’un grand SUV pour contrer Porsche, entre autres.

item.title: Lenovo’s Ryzen 7 IdeaPad Slim 3 touchscreen laptop is a $655 back-to-school and WFH steal with a $345 price cut at Best Buy right now
item.description: With Ryzen 7 chip, 16GB of DDR5 RAM, and a 512GB SSD, this laptop is an easy recommendation from me for students and remote workers.

item.title: Japanese telco giant KDDI says 12 million emails exposed in major cyberattack
item.description: Five KDDI clients were also affected when a threat actor exploited a vulnerability in third-party software.

item.title: Daily Show host Ronny Chieng reacts to Trump saying Islamic Republic of Japan
item.description: "Daily Show" host Ronny Chieng has reacted to Trump saying the "Islamic Republic of Japan", appearing to get the country mixed up with Iran.

item.title: Ollama lève 65 millions de dollars : l’IA locale n’est plus un truc de bricoleurs
item.description: Ollama, l'outil qui fait tourner une IA sur son propre PC, vient de lever 65 millions de dollars. Signe que l'IA locale n'est plus un truc de bricoleurs.

item.title: Sony's RX10 V superzoom finally arrives with a new design and 4K 120p video
item.description: Sony has finally unveiled the RX10 V superzoom with a 24-600mm zoom lens and 20.1-megapixel 1-inch sensor.

item.title: Nintendo's iOS and Android racer Mario Kart Tour will shut down later this year, with no offline mode planned
item.description: Nintendo has announced that the servers for Mario Kart Tour will be shut down later this year.

item.title: The 2026 Emmy nominations are in, and this HBO Max cast just won big
item.description: ‘The Pitt’ actors swept 13 of the 25 nominations. With its ensemble of doctors, nurses, interns and patients squeezed together into a small emergency department with scripts that play out in real time, “The Pitt” feels like a lab made to grow great performances. The Emmys rewarded it accordingly Wednesday.Thirteen of the 25 nominations for HBO Max’s drama about a Pittsburgh ER went to its actors in one of the great achievements for a cast in Emmy history.In its rookie season last year, “The Pitt” got just three acting nominations but it won all three: best actor in a drama for star Noah Wyle, ...

item.title: Sony brings back the superzoom RX10 with a stacked sensor and a high price
item.description: Sony is bringing back the RX10 superzoom camera after a nearly nine-year gap between models. The newly announced RX10 V retains the same 24-600mm equivalent f/2.4-4 Zeiss Vario-Sonnar 25x zoom lens of its last two predecessors, but it has lots of upgrades elsewhere. The new 20.1-megapixel 1-inch-type sensor is a stacked design, allowing up to […]

item.title: Comcast is breaking up with NBCU. Why did it ever buy it in the first place?
item.description: Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Peter Kafka, who is chief correspondent at Business Insider and host of Channels, a podcast about the media industry. And it’s a big week for the media industry — Comcast just announced that it’s splitting itself up, into the Comcast broadband company and the NBCUniversal entertainment company. That’s after […]

item.title: Meta says its new AI model is ready to compete on coding
item.description: After reentering the AI race with its first in-house Muse Spark model in April, Meta is now opening up the doors to developers with a new model that can plug into AI coding software with the new Meta Model API. Meta says that Muse Spark 1.1 is a "step-change" from the first generation, with improvements […]

item.title: I took over 1,000 shots with the Sony RX10 V across my kid’s sports day, a bird photography trip and more – here’s how Sony’s surprise new superzoom performed
item.description: Sony revives its bridge camera range with a surprise addition, and I predict it'll be a popular all-in-one camera.

item.title: Sony RX10 V vs Sony Cyber-shot RX10 IV: I love this classic wildlife camera’s upgrades after a nine-year wait, but there’s one big drawback
item.description: Sony just revived its RX10 series of superzoom cameras, and made wildlife photography more accessible again — here’s how the new RX10 V compares to the RX10 IV.

item.title: The Hope trailer will mess you up
item.description: "Hope" is the latest action-packed South Korean horror from "The Wailing" director Na Hong-jin. Watch Neon's trailer.

item.title: A Majority of European Lawmakers Voted Against Letting Big Tech Read Our Messages. They’re Going to Anyway.
item.description: Companies will once again be allowed to scan citizens’ personal texts, emails, and social media messages via the “chat control” bill to find child abuse material online.

item.title: Alors qu’Apple augmente ses prix, l’iMac M4 perd près de 300 € pendant les soldes
item.description: L'Apple iMac M4, le tout-en-un de la marque à la pomme lancé fin 2024, est affiché à 1 571,65 euros au lieu de 1 849 euros chez E.Leclerc pendant les soldes. De quoi s'offrir le PC fixe d'Apple à un tarif plus abordable.

item.title: ICE agents are making house calls for online critics
item.description: A few hours after checking into a hotel in New York City, David Streever woke up to a call from the front desk saying someone was looking for him. Streever had just landed on a return trip from Finland, where he'd vacationed with his daughter. Though Streever didn't know it yet, while he'd been away, […]

item.title: If you don’t want to let everyone use your Instagram public photos for AI—here’s how to opt out of Meta Muse Image
item.description: Right now, your Instagram account’s default setting is to allow anyone to ‘reuse your content . . . with AI features,’ thanks to Meta’s new Muse AI tool. This week, Meta launched Muse Image, Meta Superintelligence Lab’s first image generation model. And with the new AI tool, Meta is once again testing the limits of privacy rights.

item.title: Recharge électrique : cet abonnement à 10 € par mois veut faire chuter la facture, en ville comme sur autoroute
item.description: ENGIE Vianeo lance Vianeo Max, un abonnement à 9,99 €/mois avec un tarif unique de 0,33 €/kWh sur tout son réseau, en ville comme sur autoroute.

item.title: Chat Control de retour : pourquoi le scan de nos messages privés est rétabli jusqu’en 2028 malgré un vote d’opposition
item.description: Une majorité de députés européens a voulu rejeter le retour de Chat Control. Ça n'a pas suffi. Le texte qui autorise le scan de nos messages privés est de retour jusqu'en 2028.

item.title: Slate’s Gray $25,000 Truck Just Got a Crayola Makeover
item.description: The Bezos-backed automaker building America’s cheapest electric truck is teaming up with the crayon company in a bid to brighten its rides. Make ours Razzmatazz.

item.title: Say hello to Claude Wrapped
item.description: The popularity of Spotify Wrapped has kicked off a wide range of year-in-review features, on apps from YouTube to Uber - and now, the lookback trend has come to AI. Anthropic on Thursday announced a "reflect" feature for its Claude chatbot, allowing users to see an analysis of their usage data over the past month, […]

item.title: New York is the first US state to ban smart glasses in all its courthouses
item.description: New York has banned smart glasses in all 1,240 state, county, city, town and village courts.

item.title: Claude's new Reflect dashboard wants to help you log off of Claude
item.description: The Claude Reflect dashboard is like a mix of Spotify Wrapped and the screen time tool on your phone.

item.title: Claude will now let you reflect on how much youre using Claude
item.description: Anthropic launches a reflection tool for Claude users.

item.title: Le grand délire de Mercedes : les 5 technos inspirées d’une supercar essence sous le capot de l’AMG CLA 45 électrique
item.description: Oubliez la transition écologique timide et sans saveur. Pour vous convaincre de passer à l'électrique, Mercedes n'a pas conçu sa nouvelle AMG CLA 45 qu'en installant une batterie sous le plancher. Non, la firme d’Affalterbach a plutôt injecté une dose de technologies pour atteindre la performance jusqu'à l'impensable : moteurs inédits, batterie XXL, fausse boîte de vitesse, vibrations, etc. On fait le tour des innovations. ...

item.title: How to watch France vs. Morocco online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream France vs. Morocco in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: MOFT just launched a trackable MagSafe wallet that holds up to 8 cards — buy it now under $70
item.description: MOFT has launched the new Trackable Field Wallet, a MagSafe-compatible wallet with Apple Find My, Android Find Hub support, and room for up to eight cards.
